basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Junior Assistant, Assistant Executive Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur), Recruitment Section, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.post_name: Superintending Engineer (Civil), Deputy Registrar, Executive Engineer (Civil), Assistant Executive Engineer (Electrical), Assistant Registrar, Assistant Counsellor, Hall Management Officer, Medical Officer, Junior Superintendent, Junior Technical Superintendent, Junior Assistant, Junior Technician
basic_details.total_vacancies: 80 (across Group A, B, and C posts; IIT Kanpur reserves the right to increase/decrease the number)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via IIT Kanpur recruitment portal: https://www.iitk.ac.in/recruitment)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Kanpur is hiring 80 Non-Teaching Staff posts across Group A, B & C categories with qualifications ranging from Bachelor's/Diploma to Master's Degree as applicable per post, last date 03 July 2026.

important_dates.opening of online application: Available on IIT Kanpur recruitment portal
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified via email and IIT Kanpur recruitment portal

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the prescribed application fee through online mode only. In addition to the application fee, online bank/transaction charges + GST (if any) are also to be borne by the applicant. The fee once paid will not be refunded or re-adjusted under any circumstances. Candidates must apply and pay the fee separately for each post if applying for more than one post.

age_limit.details: Age shall be reckoned as on the closing date of the online application (03-07-2026). Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (03-07-2026). Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. Experience claimed must be post-qualification full-time work experience. All qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institution. The Institute determines the relevance of experience, and its decision is final. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

vacancy_details.Name of Post: Junior Technical Superintendent – Computer Centre (Cyber Security)
Junior Technical Superintendent – Materials Science & Engineering
Junior Technical Superintendent – Materials Science & Engineering (EE)

Junior Technician (11 Departments: Aerospace Engg., Chemistry, Civil Engg., CSE, Earth Sciences, Electrical Engg., Humanities & Social Sciences, Intelligence Systems, Materials Science & Engg., Mechanical Engg., Physics)

vacancy_details.PwD Disability Category Eligible: Clause (a): B (Blind), LV (Low Vision); Clause (c): OA, OL, OLA, BL, BLOA, LC, Dw, AAV
Clause (a): B, LV; Clause (d): ASD (M), SLD; Clause (e): MD (Multiple Disabilities)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 3 to Level 13 as per 7th CPC (post-wise; Rs. 21,700 – Rs. 2,15,900)

selection_process: Stage 1 Written Test Objective/descriptive type as decided by the Institute
Stage 2 Seminar / Presentation before Expert Panel For shortlisted candidates from Written Test

Stage 3 Personal Interview For shortlisted candidates; TA/DA reimbursable for Group A (Level 10–11): AC-II Tier train fare; Level 12 and above: Economy class airfare (actual/shortest route, whichever is less)
Stage 1 Written Test Objective type; No TA/DA payable for written/skill tests
Stage 2 Skill Test / Job-Oriented Practical Test (JOPT) As applicable per post; credentials verified with original certificates before JOPT/Interview

The Institute reserves the right to decide the mode of screening and examining applicants for shortlisting and selection. The medium for all assessments will be English language only. Being called for a test/interview only indicates that the applicant is considered potentially suitable and does not imply any assurance of selection. The Institute reserves the right to place a reasonable limit on the total number of applicants to be called for the selection process based on higher parameters over and above the essential qualification and relevant experience.
Group A Posts (Pay Level 10 and above
except Medical Officer) - Sl. No. 1 to 7
Group B & C Posts (Sl. No. 9 to 12)
In case of a tie among applicants

the age of the applicant will be taken to determine seniority. Call letters to short-listed applicants and any further information will be sent through email only. Results of examination and JOPT/Interview will be available only in individual accounts on the recruitment portal. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in written/skill tests for any post.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the IIT Kanpur recruitment portal (https://www.iitk.ac.in/recruitment). No hard copy/printout of filled application or other documents should be sent to the Institute. Candidates must use a correct and active email address throughout the recruitment process, as all correspondence will be through email only. Please save the final submitted application for future purposes.
Documents Required to be Uploaded with Online Application:
Recent passport-size photograph (scanned, clear and legible)
Proof of age (10th/Matriculation/Secondary School Leaving Certificate or equivalent)
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (all degrees from qualifying degree onwards)
Experience Certificates (on official letterhead, in chronological order, with designation, period, nature of duties, and seal/stamp) - post-qualification experience only
SC/ST Caste Certificate in Central Government prescribed format (for SC/ST applicants)
OBC (NCL) Certificate in prescribed format, clearly specifying validity period and valid as on the closing date (for OBC NCL applicants)
Income and Asset Certificate (EWS) issued by Competent Authority, valid as on the closing date (for EWS applicants)
Valid UDID/Disability Certificate issued by Competent Authority (for PwD applicants)
Documents to be Produced at Document Verification / JOPT / Interview Stage:
All original certificates and mark sheets (educational qualifications, age proof, experience)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (for candidates in Govt./PSU/Autonomous Body)
Vigilance Clearance Certificate from present employer (for candidates in Govt./PSU/Autonomous Body)
For other updates, visit the institute website and recruitment portal regularly. No interim enquiries related to eligibility status, shortlisting, or interview dates will be entertained.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible. All qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institution. Experience claimed must be post-qualification, full-time work experience. Only full-time work experience will be considered; the Institute's decision on relevance of experience is final. Applicants working in Government Institutions/PSUs/Government Funded Institutions must submit an NOC from their present employer along with vigilance clearance certificate at the document verification/JOPT/interview stage. Without NOC, they will not be permitted to proceed further. Candidates must apply and pay the fee separately for each post. In case of multiple applications for the same post, only the last application is considered; fees for earlier applications are forfeited. Admission to any stage of the recruitment process is purely provisional. Issue of Admit Card/Call Letter does not imply eligibility has been confirmed. The Institute reserves the right to decide the mode of screening, place a reasonable limit on the number of candidates called for the selection process, reject any/all applications without assigning reasons, revise/reschedule/cancel/suspend the recruitment process at any stage, and increase/decrease the number of posts. The Institute may assign/transfer selected candidates to any section/department within the Institute, including Noida Outreach Centre. Any attempt to influence the recruitment process will lead to disqualification. Any discrepancy found between the information provided in the application and supporting documents at any stage will render the candidature ineligible and lead to disqualification. No TA/DA is payable for written/skill tests. TA is reimbursed for Group A candidates called for interview (AC-II Tier train fare for Level 10–11; Economy class airfare for Level 12 and above). Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this advertisement shall be Kanpur (U.P.) only. IIT Kanpur will retain data in accordance with the Institute's record retention policy.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF
Apply Online For IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 80 vacancies have been announced across 12 post categories — Superintending Engineer, Deputy Registrar, Executive Engineer, Assistant Executive Engineer, Assistant Registrar, Assistant Counsellor, Hall Management Officer, Medical Officer, Junior Superintendent, Junior Technical Superintendent, Junior Assistant, and Junior Technician — spread across Group A (Pay Level 10 and above), Group B (Pay Level 6), and Group C (Pay Level 3). Several of these are backlog vacancies (*) reserved for specific categories.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 03-07-2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid the risk of network congestion. The age, qualification, and experience eligibility will also be reckoned as on this closing date. Applications must be submitted only through the IIT Kanpur recruitment portal (https://www.iitk.ac.in/recruitment).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Group A posts (Sl. No. 1–8): Rs. 1,500/- for General/OBC/EWS male candidates; Rs. 750/- for SC/ST/PwD and all female candidates. For Group B & C posts (Sl. No. 9–12): Rs. 1,000/- for General/OBC/EWS male candidates; Rs. 500/- for SC/ST/PwD and all female candidates. Fees must be paid online and are non-refundable. Separate fees are required for each post applied for; online bank/transaction charges + GST (if any) are additional.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by group: Group A (Level 10 and above) — up to 45 years; Group B (Level 6) — up to 35 years; Group C (Level 3) — up to 30 years. Age relaxations: SC/ST +5 years; OBC (NCL) +3 years; PwD +10 years (subject to maximum 56 years); Ex-Servicemen +3 years + service period. Regular IIT Kanpur employees may apply up to 50 years for Group B & C and 55 years for Group A. Age is reckoned as on the closing date 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process differs by post group. Group A posts (except Medical Officer): Written Test + Seminar/Presentation before an expert panel + Personal Interview. Medical Officer (Sl. No. 8): Interview only (no written test). Group B & C posts: Written Test + Skill Test / Job-Oriented Practical Test (JOPT). All assessments are conducted in the English language only. The Institute reserves the right to decide the mode of screening and may shortlist candidates based on higher parameters. No TA/DA is paid for written/skill tests; TA is reimbursable for Group A candidates called for interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for various posts in IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Pay scales as per 7th CPC: Superintending Engineer — Level-13 (Rs. 1,23,100–2,15,900); Deputy Registrar — Level-12 (Rs. 78,800–2,09,200); Executive Engineer — Level-11 (Rs. 67,700–2,08,700); Assistant Executive Engineer, Assistant Registrar, Assistant Counsellor, Hall Management Officer, Medical Officer — Level-10 (Rs. 56,100–1,77,500); Junior Superintendent and Junior Technical Superintendent — Level-6 (Rs. 35,400–1,12,400); Junior Assistant and Junior Technician — Level-3 (Rs. 21,700–69,100). In addition, Transport Allowance, Dearness Allowance, HRA, NPS Employer's Contribution, Medical, LTC, and Children's Education Allowance are admissible as per GOI rules.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for multiple posts in IIT Kanpur Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply for more than one post, but must submit a separate online application and pay a separate fee for each post. In case of multiple applications for the same single post, only the last application with the registration number will be considered; earlier applications for the same post will be rejected and the respective fees forfeited. Each post has its own eligibility criteria, so candidates must verify they meet the requirements for every post they apply for.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience mandatory for Junior Assistant and Junior Technician posts in IIT Kanpur 2026?
faq.answer: For Junior Assistant (Sl. No. 11): The essential qualification is a Bachelor's Degree with knowledge of computer applications. No minimum experience is mandatory in the essential criteria; however, a minimum 2 years of relevant administrative experience is desirable. For Junior Technician (Sl. No. 12): The essential qualification is a Bachelor's Degree / B.Sc. / 3-year Diploma in the relevant discipline. Post-qualification hands-on relevant experience (2 years for B.E./B.Tech. holders; 3 years for B.Sc./Diploma holders) is desirable but not mandatory. Only full-time, post-qualification experience is considered.
